💰 Investment Suggestions

Example recommendations — edit update_evergreen_dashboard.py to customize:

GPU Upgrade

Enable local model inference (no cloud dependency), vision models, faster embeddings.

Hardware (varies)

RAM Upgrade

More RAM enables larger local models and more concurrent operations.

Hardware (varies)

Cloud Backup Service

Automated offsite backups for ~/.openclaw/, memory files, configurations. Better disaster recovery.

Monthly subscription

Monitoring Service

Uptime monitoring, alerting for service failures, performance metrics over time.

Monthly subscription (free tiers available)
